title: ma`ad #4571
definition:
1) to slip, slide, totter, shake
    1a) (Qal) to slip
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause or make to shake or totter
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal) to slip
    1b) (Hiphil) to cause or make to shake or totter
